attributes: c. 1980s • Made in Korea • All-Over Sequin • 100% Poly
condition_notes: Labeled F&M Fashion "Jeongmin", 100% polyester; Korean maker + all-poly + older-style label date it to the 1980s (Korea was the era's garment-export hub before China). No size tag — size by measurement. Ribbed collar, cuffs, hem; sequins intact. Sold as found.
